recommendations.title: About Adam
recommendations.overview: A waitress falls for a handsome customer who seduces her, her two sisters, her brother, and her brother's girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Rental Family

recommendations.title: After
recommendations.overview: Tessa Young is a dedicated student, dutiful daughter and loyal girlfriend to her high school sweetheart. Entering her first semester of college, Tessa's guarded world opens up when she meets Hardin Scott, a mysterious and brooding rebel who makes her

recommendations.title: Os Parças
recommendations.overview: After a notorious crook pressures four pals to organize a memorable wedding party for this daughter, they decide to go all in and open an agency.

recommendations.title: Nativity!
recommendations.overview: Paul, charged with directing his school's Nativity play, falsely boasts that his ex-girlfriend plans to turn the production into a film.

recommendations.title: Ghoulies
recommendations.overview: A young man and his girlfriend move into the man's old mansion home, where he becomes possessed by a need to control ancient demons.

recommendations.title: Irma la Douce
recommendations.overview: When a recently fired policeman falls in love with a French prostitute, he doesn't want her to be with other men, so he creates an alter-ego in order to become her only customer.

recommendations.title: Scare Package
recommendations.overview: Chad Buckley is super crazy about horror movies, but also very lonely. He mostly spends his days in his small movie shop having wild discussions with his only returning customer, Sam.
recommendations.director: Chris McInroy, Aaron B. Koontz, Emily Hagins, Anthony Cousins, Noah Segan, Courtney Andujar, Baron Vaughn, Hillary Andujar

recommendations.title: Poltergeist
recommendations.overview: The Freelings' suburban home becomes the center of paranormal activity that opens a portal to the 'other side'. With help, they must cross over to get their daughter back.

recommendations.title: The Warriors Gate
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious chest opens a gateway through time, teen gamer Jack is transported to an ancient empire terrorized by a cruel barbarian king. Jack will need all of his gaming skills as he battles to defeat the barbarian, protect a beautiful prince
